name: jupyter
description: Install Jupyter Notebook (7.x) + a Python kernel + a basic scientific/astronomy stack (numpy, scipy, matplotlib, pandas, astropy, astroquery, photutils, ipywidgets) into a dedicated, contained venv at C:\MAST\jupyter\.venv (online pip via the proxy, same as the mast repo requirements), so notebooks are ready to use without hand-installing packages. All Jupyter state (data/config/runtime) is kept under C:\MAST\jupyter so it does not litter the user profile; launch-jupyter.cmd sets the JUPYTER_* dirs + working dir. The desktop-shortcuts provider (order 2700) adds a Public-desktop 'Jupyter Notebook' shortcut to the launcher.
